intent: A first-time visitor heard about undavos.com from a LinkedIn post and wants to figure out what it is, who it's for, and whether it's worth any more of their attention.
notes: v0.3 alpha acceptance test. fresh persona means in-browser state is empty; only the LLM framing differs. Patience: max_page_wait_ms 30s reflects how long a real fresh visitor would wait on page (cold-start + clicks); max_duration_ms 180s is a wall backstop absorbing Haiku selector latency (~15s/call).
